title: Segmentation fault using a column inside of a functioncall
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id UInt32, name String, age UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO users (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id UInt32, user_id UInt32, total_amount Decimal(10, 2)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY order_id;
INSERT INTO orders (order_id, user_id, total_amount) VALUES (101, 1, 250.75);
SELECT name, age, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE user_id = id) AS order_count FROM users;
key_bug_features: Using a column inside of a function call
